rows.criterion: create several topic files across catalog+btree+content
rows.covered_by: step 2: loop allocating fileID, ContentStore.Create, btree.Insert for N files under 2 topic prefixes
step 3: ContentStore.Append on a subset, including one engineered to cross defaultSplitThresholdBytes
step 4 (PrefixScan) and step 6 (point btree.Lookup) for every inserted path
step 5: ContentStore.Read byte-for-byte equality against expected content post-append; Catalog.Get SizeBytes cross-check
entire test runs in one goroutine, no t.Parallel(), no goroutines spawned
step 5 cross-checks btree-resolved fileID -> catalog record SizeBytes -> actual content length -> ContentStore.Read bytes, all agreeing
step 7: PrefixScan on nonexistent prefix returns empty; Lookup on nonexistent path returns found=false
go test -race (single-threaded so no expected data races; validates no accidental shared mutable state issues)
